sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
✨ Pyrite Geode Diwali Combo ✨

Light, Prosperity & Protection in One Divine Set

Celebrate this Diwali with a powerful fusion of beauty and blessings! The Pyrite Geode Diwali Combo brings together the golden shimmer of authentic Pyrite Geode and the soft glow of two crystal candles—a perfect blend of energy, elegance, and festivity.

Pyrite, also known as “Fool’s Gold”, is revered as the stone of abundance and protection, while candles invite light, warmth, and positivity into your home. 

Together, this combo creates an aura of prosperity, harmony, and good fortune, making it an ideal centerpiece for your Diwali décor or a thoughtful gift for loved ones.

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
- Attracts wealth, prosperity, and success into your life

- Shields your home from negative energy

- Creates a soothing, festive ambiance with candlelight

- Perfect for gifting or enhancing sacred spaces

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text:
Light the crystal candles during Diwali rituals, meditation, or to uplift your home’s energy.

Can be gifted as a meaningful token of love, light, and prosperity.
